summary: Website project deployed on the Internet Computer. User wants the admin/edit overlay panel ('What would you like to change?') fully removed from the codebase.
architectural_notes: Site is deployed on the Internet Computer (ICP) with a canister-based URL
known_issues: Admin/edit overlay panel appears above page content for all visitors across all devices — needs full removal

existing_features.title: Fully remove the CustomizationPrompt component and all references to it from the codebase. Delete the file frontend/src/components/CustomizationPrompt.tsx and remove its import, state management (the 800ms auto-display timer), and rendering from frontend/src/App.tsx so the overlay never appears for any visitor on any device.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fully remove the admin/edit overlay panel ('What would you like to change?') from the site so it never appears for any visitor
